title: Survival of the Wyld
description: The horror monsters will try to get you while you try to enjoy the seasons, paraglide, and grapple around this interesting world! + VR support!
body:
A creepy yet beautiful take on **Minecraft** (as seen on Wyldbuutang's channel) with horror monsters lurking as you try to explore this very different version of the Minecraft world!

Featuring the **cave dweller**, **weeping angels**, ~~**herobrine**~~, and **_more_**!
Explore and see the world change through various **seasons** and try to sleep through the perilous nights.. without having **nightmares**..

Move around quickly and evade monsters with **paragliders**, **grappling hooks**, and **waystones** to teleport from!
**This is the modpack from the "VR Minecraft [HORROR MODE]" series of live streams on Wyldbuutang's channel!**

Versions below 1.4.5 DO NOT INCLUDE RESOURCEPACKS - [You'll have to download them separately!](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/usw201inv2s8hxs5lx0mw/resourcepacks.zip?rlkey=r85dgkne77b1w9ak2yp7p5p7g&st=imqqg0qh&dl=1) If you're updated past that point then don't worry about it!
